title: Implement Wave 35 manager assignment decision timeline UI
description: Update the manager assignment detail screen so it renders the additive decision summary and richer timeline semantics from Wave 35 while preserving existing action buttons and evidence upload flows.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment detail renders a decision summary card when additive decision_summary metadata is available
Timeline rows show richer decision context without breaking the current screen layout
Existing reassignment, completion, cancellation, and evidence upload flows remain functional
